data.content:
Planning complete. CLI scope flags landed as a 10-flag extension to
NewArgs (src/cli.rs) and UpdateArgs (src/cli_agent.rs), routed through a
shared ScopePatch on NewOperation/UpdateOperation
(src/write_dispatch/operation_map.rs), validated post-parse in a new
scope_validation.rs (volume > 0, reliability 0-100, confidence 0.0-1.0,
stddev >= 0.0), and persisted via CreateKnotOptions + build_update_patch.
Tests live in src/cli_tests.rs (parse) and src/write_dispatch/tests.rs
(validation + round trip).

Hard dependency: knots-41ba must land first (domain fields), then 7dda
(events), then ee7d (projection). Implementation step should claim only
after those sibling knots are SHIPPED or merged into main; otherwise
flags have nowhere to write. If implementation is claimed before 41ba is
ready, return to ready_for_planning and note the dependency gap.

Follow existing CLI conventions: clap doc comments for help, post-parse
validation mirroring src/app/knot_update/fields.rs:125-147, error
messages naming the user-facing flag (scope_volume, not internal field).
Keep scope_scale free-form at the CLI layer.
